channel.title: ftp on Re-toor
channel.description: Recent content in ftp on Re-toor

item.title: Tryhackme - Startup
item.description: ) Hello, this is Neo. Today we have a CTF Tryhackme - Startup. Let’s go!!! Firstly, always, I will scan open port. I use rustscan because it faster than nmap, moreover it can integrates with nmap. I have 3 open port: port 21 with ftp server and I can login by anonymous. port 22 are running ssh on ubuntu server port 80 with Apache httpd 2.4.18 on ubuntu server In port 21, I have some insteresting here.

item.title: Tryhackme - Bounty Hacker
item.description: Hello, this is Neo. Today we have a CTF Tryhackme - Bounty Hacker. Let’s get root!!! Firstly, always, I will scan open port. I use rustscan because it faster than nmap, moreover it can integrates with nmap. There’re 3 openning port: Port 21 is running ftp-vsftpd 3.0.3 and allow to login with anonymous Port 22 is running ssh service on Ubuntu server Port 80 is running web service with Apache 2.

item.title: Tryhackme - Simple CTF
item.description: Hello, this is Neo. Today we have a CTF Tryhackme - Simple CTF. Let’s get root!!! Firstly, always, I will scan open port. I use rustscan because it faster than nmap, moreover it can integrates with nmap. There’re 3 openning port: Port 21 with ftp-vsftpd 3.0.3 Port 80 with web service Apache 2.4.18 on Ubuntu server Port 2222 with ssh service In port 21, we can login with Anonymous.
